text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 174 

MTRC_DCML_QTY 

LABEL: Metric Decimal Quantity of Product 

DESCRIPTION: The quantity of a drug, service, or product that is rendered/dispensed for a prescription, specific date 
of service, or billing time span. 

SHORT NAME: MTRC_DCML_QTY 

LONG NAME: MTRC_DCML_QTY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Valid numeric value,
